channel.title: Development on Xiao.chen
channel.description: Recent content in Development on Xiao.chen

item.title: Getting started rust development
item.description: The sample is: rustup doc in local Environment setup 1# update the rust binary 2rustup update 3# uninstall the rust and rustup self 4rustup self uninstall 5 6rustc -V 7cargo -V Basic commands 1rustc --version 2cargo --version 3 4# crate the cargo project 5cargo new exercise 6cd exercise 7cargo run 8 9# to fast check 10cargo check 11# build 12cargo build --release 13# to debug 14cargo run 15# to debug build 16cargo build 17# to fromat the code 18rustfmt .
